name: PAX Cleaning Swabs - Pack of 75
summary: The PAX Cleaning Swabs are the perfect solution for keeping any PAX vaporiser fresh and performing at its best.
description: The PAX Cleaning Swabs are the perfect solution for keeping any PAX vaporiser fresh and performing at its best. Each swab features a sturdy wooden handle and a soft absorbent tip, making it easy to remove buildup and residue from the oven and mouthpiece. These single-use cleaning swabs are designed for effortless maintenance and precision cleaning. Whether used dry or with your preferred cleaning solution, they help extend the life of your PAX device and ensure every session tastes clean and pure. A clean device gives cleaner vapour and a more reliable dose.
